missionFrame.function: Advance Enemy's Garden through an authored tactical case while preserving regional continuity.
missionFrame.dramaticQuestion: What kind of acting captain takes command when hunger, contagion, privacy, and public authority become one problem?

forbiddenOutcomes: end Enemy's Garden from a single failed check
remove player agency from command decisions
solve regional famine with unlimited replicators
reveal the complete K-17 architecture without earned evidence

phases.title: The Empty Chair
phases.summary: Dorel enters medical isolation and the new XO receives the conn while the Arda emergency is still unfolding.
phases.directorPurpose: Dorel enters medical isolation and the new XO receives the conn while the Arda emergency is still unfolding.

phases.title: The First Harvest
phases.summary: Field teams evacuate exposed workers, stabilize the processing tower, and protect enough grain and evidence for later decisions.
phases.directorPurpose: Field teams evacuate exposed workers, stabilize the processing tower, and protect enough grain and evidence for later decisions.

phases.title: The Quarantine Line
phases.summary: Medical, shuttle, transporter, and ship operations require an explicit quarantine posture under imperfect detection.
phases.directorPurpose: Medical, shuttle, transporter, and ship operations require an explicit quarantine posture under imperfect detection.

phases.title: A Region Listening
phases.summary: The player reports the emergency, acting command, known K-17 risk, and immediate harvest posture to Starfleet and the region.
phases.directorPurpose: The player reports the emergency, acting command, known K-17 risk, and immediate harvest posture to Starfleet and the region.

facts.summary: The Arda processing tower released a dormant spore cloud during routine cycling.
Standard transporter biofilters do not reliably identify the dormant control-spore signature.
Dorel has a neurological response that makes normal duty unsafe and requires isolation.
Shutting the complex for the full decontamination cycle will cost a material portion of the regional grain reserve.
The released spores belong to a family involved in K-17 dormancy and environmental command responses.

actorIntentions.summary: Protect workers and the mission without using her condition to dictate from sickbay.
Establish medically credible isolation and prevent politics from overriding release criteria.
Keep enough of the Arda complex operating to prevent a regional grain shock.
Create a clear operations plan and test whether the new XO can make timely decisions.

pressures.label: Dorel is suddenly unavailable and the crew needs a lawful, functional command chain.

readinessGates.motive: The actor or physical process has an established reason to act.
readinessGates.information: The actor possesses enough relevant information to choose this action.
readinessGates.opportunity: The mission situation provides a plausible opportunity.
readinessGates.resources: Available personnel, ships, access, field systems, or supplies are sufficient.
readinessGates.riskTolerance: The expected cost is consistent with the actor current posture.
readinessGates.timing: The action follows elapsed time or a committed player or world event.

actionWindow.earliestPlausibleAction: After the linked phase begins and readiness gates are met.
actionWindow.preferredDramaticWindow: When the pressure complicates an established decision without erasing freeform solutions.
actionWindow.latestUsefulAction: Before the mission end state or causal removal of access.
actionWindow.cooldownAfterAction: At least one meaningful response or scene boundary.
actionWindow.setupRequired: Use observable setup and causal evidence before escalation.
actionWindow.expiresWhen: The objective transforms, actor withdraws, or access is removed.

decisionPoints.title: Assume the Chair
decisionPoints.prompt: How will the new XO establish acting command, protect Dorel medical privacy, and delegate the Arda response?
decisionPoints.stakes: Crew confidence; Dorel dignity; Regional legitimacy; Operational clarity
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Options are examples only; accept any causally grounded freeform command intent.

decisionPoints.title: Processing Tower Response
decisionPoints.prompt: What evacuation, isolation, shutdown, and harvest-continuity posture will command authorize at the exposed tower?
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Options are examples only; accept any causally grounded freeform command intent.

decisionPoints.title: Ship Quarantine Posture
decisionPoints.prompt: Will the Celandine hold orbit, withdraw, compartmentalize, or continue shuttle operations under enhanced screening?
decisionPoints.stakes: Ship safety; Relief continuity; Crew fatigue; Public confidence
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Options are examples only; accept any causally grounded freeform command intent.

decisionPoints.title: First Public Briefing
decisionPoints.prompt: What will command state about Dorel, K-17 risk, Arda harvest continuity, and uncertainty?
decisionPoints.stakes: Public trust; Medical privacy; Hoarding risk; Starfleet record
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Options are examples only; accept any causally grounded freeform command intent.

commandDecisions.title: Assume the Chair
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award Command Bearing when the player assumes explicit responsibility while preserving medical authority and useful delegation.

commandDecisions.title: Processing Tower Response
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award Command Bearing when the player balances immediate rescue, quarantine, and downstream food consequence under uncertainty.

commandDecisions.title: Ship Quarantine Posture
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award Command Bearing when the player defines a credible shipwide posture with explicit release criteria and operating limits.

commandDecisions.title: First Public Briefing
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award Command Bearing when the player communicates consequential uncertainty without inventing certainty or hiding the operational truth.
